purpose: 修正并重跑 pullback_confirmation_001。上一轮结果显示回踩确认线有苗头，但报告存在关键验证缺陷：baseline 被算成 0、actual_date_range 与 90/120 窗口不一致、JSON 未保留 5196 个全量配置、Top 20 几乎全是 90d，无法判断 120d 稳定性。因此不能晋级，需要先把回测框架修干净再判断。

observed_promising_90d_configs.note: Too few trades for promotion, but useful clue.

critical_defects_to_fix: baseline_summary reports 120d pp20 return/DD/rdd/PF as 0.0, so dd_vs_baseline is invalid.
actual_date_range shown as 2023-11-28 ~ 2026-06-08 even for w90, which means metrics/equity curve are not cleanly restricted to the requested 90/120 trading-day window.
Full all_results is not written to JSON; only top_20_realistic/top_20_optimistic/rejected are saved, preventing independent review.
Target answer q1_target_met=true is misleading because top reported best has only 30 trades and primary requirement emphasized 120d stability.

requested_work.description: Read STRATEGY_WORKLOG.md, pullback_confirmation_001 result files, and run_pullback_confirmation_backtest.py. First diagnose the four defects listed above. Do not just rerun the old script unchanged.

Patch or create a new script, recommended name run_pullback_confirmation_fix_rerun.py. Keep it standalone. It must write full all_results to the raw JSON or a separate full-results JSON/CSV so Codex can audit every configuration.

Fix windowing. For each window_days, restrict signals, entries, equity curve start, and baseline comparison to the last N eligible entry dates, plus only the necessary forward exit buffer. actual_date_range must reflect the actual tested entry-date range, not the full kline cache range.

Fix baseline. Reproduce or import the known tail-entry d3+ma20_gap + dec_E baseline for the same universe, same window, same position_pct, same max_positions. Baseline metrics must be nonzero where trades exist. Cross-check 120d pp20 against the known ballpark: return about +25%, DD about -27%, r/dd about 0.93. If different, explain why.

Make 120d primary. Rank and report separately: 120d realistic T+1 open configs with trades>=50; 120d realistic T+1 open configs with trades>=30 exploratory; 90d realistic configs as secondary. Do not allow a 90d config to be called final best.

Focus rerun grid on the promising families from the first attempt plus controls: TP_RANK/no_chase/close_positive_after_pullback/hold5; TP_RANK/lower_shadow_reclaim/hold5; TP_TOP20/shallow_pullback/close_positive_after_pullback/hold5; TP_MA/lower_shadow_reclaim/hold5; include pp10/pp15/pp20 and mp2/mp3. Also include failed touch_reclaim_ma20 as a reject control.

For every candidate, report first_half and second_half using portfolio equity/closed trades within the same 120d window, not just trade-level min return. A config that loses money in one half is not promotable unless clearly labeled exploratory.

Promotion standard: realistic T+1 open, 120d, trade_count>=50, max_drawdown <= -18%, PF>1.4, positive total_return preferably >=8%, r/dd >= tail baseline, and first/second halves not contradictory. If no config meets this, do not promote; identify best exploratory candidate.

Compare whether DD reduction comes from lower exposure/trade count or genuinely better trade quality: report trade_count_ratio_vs_tail_baseline, avg_cash_usage, avg_trade_return, median_trade_return, longest_loss_streak, worst 10, top 10.

Final answer must say: after fixing the framework, does pullback confirmation still look promising; which rule family survives 120d; should this become the next active strategy line or remain exploratory.

questions_for_cc: Was the previous pullback_confirmation_001 report invalid due to baseline/windowing defects?
After fixing, does any 120d realistic T+1 open pullback config meet the promotion standard?
Which rule family survives 120d: no_chase, lower_shadow_reclaim, shallow_pullback, or MA-structure pullback?
Is the improvement genuine trade quality or merely lower exposure/trade count?
Should pullback confirmation become the next active strategy line, or only an exploratory branch?
constraints: Do not restore V9 total score as sole buy signal.
Do not use future data for signal or confirmation.
Do not call a 90d-only result final promotion.
Do not treat baseline=0 as valid.
Do not hide full results; output all configurations.
Do not promote low trade-count configs as final even if DD is low.
Keep production advisor code unchanged in this task unless absolutely necessary.
done_when: reports contains raw summary and full-results file
baseline metrics are nonzero and cross-checked against known tail baseline
summary explicitly states whether pullback confirmation survives 120d realistic validation
